Scenario: Verify admin can add a new user with email and role
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Click Add User
3. Enter email and select role
4. Save
ExpectedResult: New user appears in user list with correct role

Scenario: Verify admin can edit an existing user's role
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Click Edit on a user
3. Change role
4. Save
ExpectedResult: User role updated — reflected immediately

Scenario: Verify admin can deactivate a user
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Click Deactivate on active user
ExpectedResult: User marked Inactive — cannot log in

Scenario: Verify admin can reactivate a deactivated user
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Click Activate on inactive user
ExpectedResult: User marked Active — can log in again

Scenario: Verify admin cannot delete a user (soft deactivate only)
Steps:
1. Open Users list
2. Check for Delete option
ExpectedResult: No permanent delete button — only Deactivate

Scenario: Verify user list shows email role and status for each user
Steps: 1. Open Admin > Users
ExpectedResult: Each user row shows email role and Active/Inactive status

Scenario: Verify admin can search/filter users by email
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Type in search field
ExpectedResult: List filters to matching users

Scenario: Verify admin can reset a user's password
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Users
2. Click Reset Password on a user
ExpectedResult: Password reset email sent or temporary password set

Scenario: Verify activity log shows all user actions
Steps: 1. Go to Admin > Activity Log
ExpectedResult: All actions listed with user timestamp and category

Scenario: Verify activity log can be filtered by category
Steps:
1. Go to Activity Log
2. Select category tab (TestCases / Users / Modules)
ExpectedResult: Only entries of selected category shown

Scenario: Verify activity log shows correct user for each action
Steps:
1. Perform an action as a specific user
2. Check Activity Log
ExpectedResult: Action appears with correct username

Scenario: Verify activity log entries are paginated
Steps: 1. Go to Activity Log with many entries
ExpectedResult: Entries split across pages — pagination controls visible

Scenario: Verify activity log is read-only (no delete or edit)
Steps: 1. Open Activity Log
ExpectedResult: No delete or edit buttons — log is append-only

Scenario: Verify admin can configure SMTP settings
Steps:
1. Go to Admin > Settings > SMTP
2. Enter host port username password
3. Save and test
ExpectedResult: Test email sent successfully

Scenario: Verify admin can change the Reset PIN
Steps:
1. Update ResetPin in appsettings.json
2. Restart application
3. Try reset with new PIN
ExpectedResult: New PIN accepted — old PIN rejected

Scenario: Verify admin can view application version info
Steps: 1. Go to Admin > Settings or About
ExpectedResult: Application version and build info displayed

Scenario: Verify admin can configure allowed email domain for registration
Steps:
1. Check appsettings for domain restriction
2. Attempt register with disallowed domain
ExpectedResult: Registration blocked for non-configured domain

Scenario: Verify monthly summary shows total test sessions per month
Steps: 1. Go to Admin > Reports > Monthly Summary
ExpectedResult: Sessions grouped by month with counts

Scenario: Verify monthly summary shows pass/fail/blocked counts per month
Steps: 1. Open Monthly Summary report
ExpectedResult: Pass Fail Blocked counts shown per month

Scenario: Verify monthly summary can be exported to Excel
Steps:
1. Open Monthly Summary
2. Click Export
ExpectedResult: Excel file downloaded with monthly data

Scenario: Verify monthly summary shows trend across last 6 months
Steps: 1. Open Monthly Summary
ExpectedResult: Chart or table shows data for last 6 months

Scenario: Verify analytical report shows top failing test cases
Steps: 1. Go to Admin > Reports > Analytical
ExpectedResult: Top N failing test cases listed with fail count

Scenario: Verify analytical report shows pass rate by module
Steps: 1. Open Analytical Report
ExpectedResult: Each module shows pass rate percentage

Scenario: Verify analytical report shows tester productivity (cases per session)
Steps: 1. Open Analytical Report
ExpectedResult: Per-user test case counts visible

Scenario: Verify analytical report can be filtered by date range
Steps:
1. Open Analytical Report
2. Set date range filter
ExpectedResult: Data updates to show only selected period

Scenario: Verify admin dashboard shows total users and active sessions
Steps:
1. Log in as admin
2. Check dashboard
ExpectedResult: User count and active session count visible

Scenario: Verify admin dashboard shows overall pass/fail/blocked totals
Steps: 1. Open admin dashboard
ExpectedResult: Totals shown across all users and sessions

Scenario: Verify admin dashboard charts render without errors
Steps:
1. Open admin dashboard
2. Check charts
ExpectedResult: All charts load and display data correctly

Scenario: Verify admin dashboard data refreshes on page reload
Steps:
1. Complete some tests
2. Reload admin dashboard
ExpectedResult: Updated totals reflected immediately
